adversarial_probe_coverage_rule.rule: No benchmark pack is admissible unless it preserves blocked, failed, and challenge rows alongside positive bounded rows.

claim_boundary: W4 freezes benchmark law for KT's actual category and preserves negative-result visibility. This constitution does not by itself earn comparative widening, superiority, or prestige language.

comparator_policy.hard_rule: Comparators must be real current-head comparators or current-head blocker surfaces. No strawman comparator may appear.

contamination_policy.rule: Historical bounded packets, documentary mirrors, and archive-only receipts may not enter current-head benchmark rows.

cost_accounting_rule.rule: Benchmark interpretation must preserve route economics and cost-of-uncertainty rather than reporting wins without operational cost context.

dataset_registry.scope: canonical entrypoint probes plus same-host LIVE_HASHED witnesses
two live adapters plus one bounded generated candidate under one contract
candidate generation, tournament, promotion-decision, rollback, and learning-response
blocked, failed, or not-yet-earned rows that must remain machine-visible

failure_row_retention_rule.rule: All blocked, failed, or not-yet-earned rows remain published in the negative-result ledger. Suppression invalidates the scorecard.

hard_rule: No benchmark-backed language may be used unless the benchmark pack is governed by this constitution and its negative rows remain visible.

holdout_policy.rule: Benchmark rows are frozen per current head and may not change after execution to rescue weak outcomes.

latency_accounting_rule.required_measurement: bounded operator-visible latency and replay burden per benchmark pack
latency_accounting_rule.rule: Latency may be bounded and same-host scoped, but it must be surfaced whenever benchmark-backed language is used.

reopen_rule: Satisfied lower gates may only be reopened by current regression receipt.

replayability_coverage_rule.rule: No benchmark row may be narrated above the highest earned replayability class for the exact surface.

scope_boundary: Current-head-bound benchmark law anchored to one canonical Gate C scorecard only; documentary alias is detached from validator/counting paths.
